title: OpenBES Specification Schema
description: JSON Schema for the Open Building Energy Simulation specification.

SUPPORTED_COUNTRIES.description: Country in which the building is. [Used for lookup tables concerning e.g. CO2eq/kwH. Will eventually deprecate in favour of EPW file country.]

FECCoefficientsRow.description: Primary energy and CO2 coefficients for a single energy source.

PEC_per_kWh_FEC.description: Total primary energy factor (kWh primary / kWh final).

PECnr_per_kWh_FEC.description: Non-renewable primary energy factor (kWh primary / kWh final).

kgCO2_per_kWh_FEC.description: CO2-equivalent emission factor (kg CO2 eq / kWh final).

CustomFECCoefficients.description: Custom per-energy-source primary energy and CO2 coefficients. Any omitted values default to the 'Other' country values from the built-in lookup table.

Electricity.description: Final Energy Consumption coefficients for electricity.

Diesel.description: Final Energy Consumption coefficients for diesel.

LPG.description: Final Energy Consumption coefficients for LPG.

Natural gas.description: Final Energy Consumption coefficients for natural gas.

Biomass.description: Final Energy Consumption coefficients for biomass.

Pellets.description: Final Energy Consumption coefficients for pellets.

FECCoefficients.description: FEC (Final Energy Consumption) coefficients source: either a preset country name for built-in lookup-table values, or a custom object specifying per-energy-source coefficients (any omitted values fall back to the 'Other' country defaults).

height.description: Height of the building in m.

length.description: Length of the building in m.

width.description: Width of the building in m.

floor_count.description: Number of floors in the building.

floor_to_ceiling_height.description: Floor to ceiling height in m.

orientation_angle.description: Orientation angle of the building in degrees clockwise from North=0.

roof_angle.description: Roof angle in degrees from horizontal.

solar_external_shading_summer.description: External solar shading factor for summer (Summer = air temp > 22C).

solar_external_shading_winter.description: External solar shading factor for winter (Winter = air temp <= 22C).

thermal_bridge_facade_ground.description: Whether to model the thermal bridge factor for facade to ground junctions.

thermal_bridge_facade_intermediate.description: Whether to model the thermal bridge factor for facade to intermediate floor junctions.

thermal_bridge_facade_roof.description: Whether to model the thermal bridge factor for facade to roof junctions.

thermal_bridge_shading.description: Whether to model the thermal bridge factor for shading devices.

thermal_bridge_window.description: Whether to model the thermal bridge factor for windows.

uvalue_facade.description: U-value of the facade in W/m2K.

uvalue_roof.description: U-value of the roof in W/m2K.

uvalue_window.description: U-value of the windows in W/m2K.

uvalue_floor.description: U-value of the floor in W/m2K.

front.description: Array of window counts per floor on the front side of the building.

back.description: Array of window counts per floor on the back side of the building.

left.description: Array of window counts per floor on the left side of the building.

right.description: Array of window counts per floor on the right side of the building.

window_counts.description: A map of building side to array of window counts per floor.

Duration.description: Duration object representing a time period within a day. Systems come on at the beginning of their Start hour and switch off at the end of their End hour.

areas.description: Zone area for each floor in m2

active_hours.description: Times the zone is occupied each day.

ZoneSimultaneity.description: A map of Zone name - Simultaneity factor where Zone name is a previously declared Zone.

OccupationSchedule.description: Whether the building is occupied during given months and days.

Range.description: A numeric range with minimum and maximum values.

Consumption.description: Consumption of a resource by with a monthly breakdown.

energy_source.description: Energy source for this heating system.

active_hours.description: Times the system is on each day.
Times the system is on each day.
Times the system is on each day.

LightingSystem.description: A lighting system for a particular zone (replaces lighting_system_*_zN scattered fields).

name.description: Optional human label for the system.

active_hours.description: Times the lighting is on each day.
active_hours.$comment: Reduced to simply the number of hours/day the lights are on.

count.description: Count of similar lighting systems aggregated together.

energy_source.description: Energy source for this hot water system.

efficiency_cop.description: Efficiency of the hot water system.

nominal_capacity.description: Nominal capacity of the hot water system.

type.description: Label for the hot water system.

Courtyard.description: Courtyard geometry / count object. Replaces flat courtyard_length, courtyard_width, courtyard_number fields.

count.description: How many courtyards of this geometry exist.

OpenCourtyard.description: Courtyard geometry / count object. Replaces flat courtyard_length, courtyard_width, courtyard_number fields.

count.description: How many courtyards of this geometry exist.

OpenCourtyardMap.description: The open courtyards on each side of the building.

HeatCapacity.description: Heat capacity of the building, either as a preset class or custom Am/Cm values.

CustomHeatCapacity.$comment: Determined via lookup in Excel, or via special-case calculation from advanced_heat_capacity_am and air_heat_capacity * heat_capacity_joule. These underlying values are not guaranteed to be recoverable from Am and Cm alone.

OpenBESParameters.description: Parameters of the simulation. These do not normally need to be adjusted, and many refer to physical constants.

heat_capacity_joule.description: Heat capacity of air in J/kgK.

leakage_air_flow_dependent.description: Leakage air flow rate dependent on other factors (m3/s).

nia_gba_ratio.description: Net internal area / gross building area fraction.

output_csv_precision.description: Number of decimal places in CSV output.

view_factor_to_sky_facade.description: View factor to sky from facade.

view_factor_to_sky_roof.description: View factor to sky from roof.

parameters.description: Collapsed parameters object. Use this to hold heating/cooling/ventilation/lighting/courtyards arrays.

hot_water_systems.description: Hot water systems in the building.

open_courtyards.description: Open courtyards on each side of the building.

biomass_consumption.description: Amount of biomass consumed by the building. [UNUSED]

biomass_pellets_consumption.description: Amount of biomass pellets consumed by the building. [UNUSED]

building_standby_electricity_consumption.description: Electrical standby load for the building.

diesel_consumption.description: Amount of diesel consumed by the building. [UNUSED]

electricity_consumption.description: Amount of electricity consumed by the building. [UNUSED]
electricity_consumption.$comment: In the TOML spec, this appears as both monthly breakdown and an annual value. The JSON always translates this to monthly values, and, if given, the monthly values in the TOML take precedence.

other_electricity_consumption.description: Amount of other electricity consumed by the building. [UNUSED]

energy_generated.description: Amount of energy generated by the building. [UNUSED]

energy_used.description: Amount of energy used by the building. [UNUSED]

other_gas_consumption.description: Amount of other gas consumed by the building. [UNUSED]

LPG_consumption.description: Amount of LPG consumed by the building. [UNUSED]

natural_gas_consumption.description: Amount of natural gas consumed by the building. [UNUSED]
natural_gas_consumption.$comment: In the TOML spec, this appears as both monthly breakdown and an annual value. The JSON always translates this to monthly values, and, if given, the monthly values in the TOML take precedence.

fec_coefficients.description: FEC coefficient source: a preset country name (e.g. 'Spain', 'UK') or a custom object with per-energy-source overrides. Omitted values default to the 'Other' country row.

heat_capacity.description: Heat capacity properties of the building.

holiday.description: Whether the building is open on public holidays.

leakage_air_flow_independent.description: Leakage air flow rate independent of other factors (m3/s).

max_building_occupation.description: Maximum occupancy of the building in number of people.

typical_occupation.description: Typical occupancy of the building in number of people.

SpaceThermalDemandResult.description: Heating or cooling demand and load statistics.

demand_total.description: Annual energy required for heating/cooling in kWh.

demand_scaled.description: Annual energy required for heating/cooling in kWh/m2.

demand_on_all_year.description: Annual energy demanded in kWh/m2 if the system is on all year round.

load_csv.description: Load in kWh/m2 by calendar month.

load_duration_csv.description: Load in kW by annual percentile.

VentilationSystemResult.description: Characteristics of a ventilation system simulation.

peak_load.description: Maximum hourly energy required in kW.

mechanical_ventilation_rate.description: Mechanical ventilation rate in m3/h per m2. Recommended: 3 m3/h m2.

ventilation_rate.description: Ventilation rate in l/s m2. Reference: 0.83l/s m2 or 12.5l/s per person.

ThermalSystemResult.description: Characteristics of a heating or cooling system simulation.

conditioned_area.description: Conditioned equivalent area in m2 (conditioned area adjusted for simultaneity).

energy_demand.description: Energy demanded in kWh/m2 when specific zonal occupancy is simulated.

system_usage.description: Energy demand divided by conditioned area (no simultaneity adjustment) in kWh/m2

peak_capacity.description: Maximum hourly energy consumed in kW.

peak_ratio.description: Sensible peak capacity for cooling systems. For heating systems, peak capacity/load at 99.6th percentile.

ModelValidation.description: Model validation information for electricity or natural gas usage when comparing simulated monthly values to user-supplied monthly values.

energy_use_csv.description: Energy used for each calendar month in kWh. Compare to user-supplied values in `OpenBESSpecification.*_consumption`.

cv_rmse.description: Coefficient of variation of the root mean square deviation.

DayPeak.description: A statistic with the month, and day at which it occurred.

HourPeak.description: A statistic with the month, day, and hour at which it occurred.

LocationSimulationOutput.description: Outputs produced by the location simulation using EPW-derived data.

latitude.description: Latitude as read from the weather file.

longitude.description: Longitude as read from the weather file.

city.description: City as read from the weather file.

country.description: Country as read from the weather file.

state_province.description: State/province as read from the weather file.

solstice_ghr_csv.description: Global Horizontal Radiation (Wh/m2) for the longest and shortest days of the year (21 Dec, 21 Jun).

mean_outdoor_temperature.description: Mean outdoor temperature over the year.

max_outdoor_day_temperature.description: Hottest day of the year where the temperature is the mean of the hottest hour plus and coldest hour.

min_outdoor_day_temperature.description: Coldest day of the year where the temperature is the mean of the hottest hour plus and coldest hour.

mean_outdoor_day_temperature.description: Mean daily temperature given by the mean of the hottest hour plus and coldest hour.

temperature_quantiles_csv.description: Outdoor air temperature percentiles from temperature data.

annual_incident_solar_radiation_csv.description: Annual incident solar radiation in kWh/m2 for each 1/8th compass point.

conditioned_floor_area.description: Floor area subject to HVAC systems. Used as the divisor in most /m2 statistics.

indoor_air_volume.description: Volume of air in the building's conditioned areas in m3.

indoor_air_heat_capacity.description: Indoor air heat capacity in kJ/K

building_envelope_csv.description: Building area by floor and category in m2, and window-to-wall ratio (unitless).

building_geometry_orientation_csv.description: Building facade, window, and roof area in m2 by category and orientation.

ThermalSimulationOutput.description: Outputs produced by the thermal simulation.

external_internal_temperature_csv.description: Internal (HVAC) and external temperatures for each hour of the year.

mean_indoor_temperature.description: Mean indoor temperature over the year.

discomfort_hours_percent.description: The number of hours when the building is occupied and it would be outside 18-26C if HVAC were not operating.

discomfort_hours_percent_summer.description: The number of hours when the building is occupied and it would be outside 18-26C if HVAC were not operating during June, July, and August.

heat_exchange_breakdown_csv.description: The heat loss/gain in kWh/m2 for each month, broken down by transmission category.

space_thermal_demand_csv.description: The heating and cooling energy requirement in kWh/m2 for each month of the year based on heat, mass balance, and occupancy.

running_average_outside_temp_csv.description: The 7-day weighted running mean of the outside temperature for each hour of the year. The first 6 days copy the value from day 7.

overheating_limits_csv.description: Category I, II, and III overheating limits in °C at different outdoor temperatures.

solar_heat_gains_csv.description: Solar heat gains in kWh by orientation and category. For kWh/m2 divide by relevant `building_facade_csv` area.

window_transmissivity_coefficient_csv.description: Annual transmissivity coefficient of windows by orientation.

VentilationSimulationOutput.description: Outputs produced by ventilation system simulations.

HeatingSimulationOutput.description: Outputs produced by heating system simulations.

CoolingSimulationOutput.description: Outputs produced by cooling system simulations.

lighting_demand.description: Energy demand for lighting in kWh/m2.

HotWaterSimulationOutput.description: Outputs produced by hot water simulations.

hot_water_demand.description: Energy demand for water heating in kWh/m2.

BuildingEnergySimulationOutput.description: Outputs that require combining multiple simulation domains.

other_energy_use_gas.description: Miscellaneous natural gas usage in kWh/m2.

on_site_electricity_generated.description: Renewable electricity generated on site in kWh/m2.

on_site_electricity_used.description: Renewable electricity generated and consumed on site in kWh/m2.

on_site_electricity_fraction.description: Renewable energy consumption / Final energy consumption

all_renewable_fraction.description: Fraction of final energy consumption drawn from renewable energy sources including both on- and off-site renewable energy sources.

non_renewable_primary_energy_consumption.description: Non-renewable primary energy consumption in kWh/m2.

co2_equivalent_emissions.description: CO2 equivalent emissions in kg CO2 eq/m2.

final_energy_consumption_csv.description: Final energy consumption in kWh broken down by System (row) and energy source (columns: System, Electricity, Diesel, LPG, Natural gas, Biomass, Pellets). Summing all energy source columns for a row recovers the total for that system. Divide by `conditioned_floor_area` for kWh/m2.

OpenBESOutput.description: Aggregate simulation outputs split by owning simulation. Outputs that are not possible to generate are omitted from their simulation section.

timestamp.description: Timestamp of when the simulation was run.

EPW_file_checksum.description: MD5 Checksum of the EPW file used in the simulation.

log.description: Log output from the simulation run.
